description.overview: The Saluki is one of the oldest dog breeds, treasured by pharaohs and nomadic tribes for thousands of years.
description.temperament: Salukis are gentle and devoted to family but aloof with strangers. Independent and cat-like.
description.health: Generally healthy but prone to heart conditions and certain cancers.
description.exercise: Need daily exercise and secure areas to run. Strong prey drive.

verdict.summary: Ancient, elegant sighthounds with independent spirits. Salukis are gentle and devoted but aloof. Need experienced owners and secure running areas.
